twitter_thread: 47% of Agentic Mfw outputs are incorrect. Misconfigured 'feedback loops' are the top cause.
Default Mfw settings misattribute 23% of outcomes. Try recalibrating with 5-fold cross-validation.
Mfw's 'learning delay' costs 17% of potential gains. Switch to batch processing with 100-sample batches.
Customizing Mfw's 'feedback loops' shaves off 12% of computation time. Use 3-layer architectures.
34% of Mfw users report 'temporal inconsistencies' in real-time decisions. Consider caching results.
Have you optimized Agentic Mfw for your use case? What tweaks worked for you? #aimfw #mlerrors
